events.content: "Evidence": "npx markdownlint-cli2 executed on touched .md files; 0 errors reported"
"action": "Implemented .claude/skills/orphan-ref-validator/ with scripts/scan.py and tests/test_scan.py; 34 tests pass"
"action": "Wired orphan-ref-validator as fourth Mandatory Exit Gate in .claude/commands/build.md with VERDICT: CRITICAL_FAIL blocking semantics"
"action": "Refactored denylist into filters.py module per taste-lints file-size cap; renamed from _filters.py to satisfy snake_case naming rule. scan.py 485 lines under cap. 34 tests pass, scan PASS"

"action": "Pre-push surfaced two blockers: marketplace count divergence with canonical validator_marketplace_counts.py (my naive iterdir counted templates/CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md), and security-suppression comment. Aligned enumerate_count to canonical strategies per canonical-source-mirror.md (excluded AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md from agents; recursive walk for commands). Replaced try/except ImportError with __package__ check to remove type: ignore. Ran build/scripts/build_all.py to regenerate src/copilot-cli/skills/orphan-ref-validator/ and src/copilot-cli/skills/build/SKILL.md mirrors."

"action": "PR review feedback round 1: 19 inline comments. Critical fixes - (1) Success envelope contract per ADR-056: Success now reflects scan execution not finding presence, true on CRITICAL_FAIL with verdict expressing it; (2) _resolve_repo_root raises RepoRootError on missing/non-dir paths, main maps to exit 2; (3) enumerate_skills returns None when dir absent (was returning empty set, masked downstream warn-vs-critical disambiguation); (4) COUNT_CLAIM_RE rewritten to mirror canonical COUNT_PATTERN byte-for-byte (handles 'reusable skills', 'slash commands', 'lifecycle hooks', 'specialized agent definitions'); (5) enumerate_count switches on canonical labels with legacy aliases; (6) _walk_targets uses iterdir+prune instead of rglob+postfilter for performance; (7) walked-file containment recheck post symlink resolution (CWE-22 hardening); (8) count_claim emission delegated to canonical validate_marketplace_counts.py per canonical-source-mirror.md (multi-plugin manifests need YAML config); enforce_counts param reserved for PR2; (9) TASK-007 frontmatter merged into one block (assignee was outside metadata); (10) DESIGN-008 added required sections (Requirements Addressed, Design Overview, Component Details, Technology Decisions, Security Considerations, Testing Strategy); (11) REQ-008/DESIGN-008/TASK-008 deferred-list updated to reflect AC3 ships in PR1 and AC4 emission delegated; (12) SKILL.md flag table reflects actual defaults (no .claude/skills/ in default scope); (13) build.md gate 4 uses Skill() invocation instead of hardcoded path. 40 tests pass; self-test PASS."

"action": "PR review feedback round 2: per-call enumerate_count cache to eliminate redundant filesystem walks per gemini perf comment; REQ-008 and DESIGN-008 related fields complete forward-trace (REQ -> DESIGN -> TASK); TASK-008 status changed from draft to in-progress and complexity: M added to satisfy spec validator; episode-2026-05-10-session-1830.json hand-rewritten with valid event-type enums (milestone/error/recovery), accurate metrics (9 commits, 32 files, 240 min, 2 errors, 2 recoveries), explicit decisions, and three lessons learned; test_scan.py uses importlib.util.spec_from_file_location with file-keyed module names to avoid sys.modules collision between .claude/skills and src/copilot-cli/skills mirrored test suites."

"action": "Round 4 (5-axis /review verdicts: REQUEST_CHANGES from architect/security/qa + taste-lints FAIL on scan.py 719 lines). Critical fixes: (1) Extract walking.py (CWE-22/CWE-59 hardening: is_safe_subdirectory rejects symlink directories outside repo before recursion); align EXCLUDE_DIR_NAMES with canonical _EXCLUDED_DIRS (added worktrees, cache; kept references, templates as documented divergence). (2) Extract counts.py to mirror canonical-source verbatim and centralize the working-tree enumeration. (3) Extract envelope.py with Finding/ScanResult and render_envelope/render_error_envelope; expose render_error_envelope for the exit-2 path so configuration errors emit ADR-056 Success=false envelope (was unreachable). (4) Extend secret denylist (id_rsa, id_ed25519, id_ecdsa, id_dsa, .pfx, .p12, .netrc, .npmrc, .pypirc, credentials). (5) enumerate_skills returns None when .claude/skills/ is a regular file (vendored-install corruption); was raising NotADirectoryError. (6) Decompose _iter_dir_pruned into _iter_entry + _within_size_cap to satisfy cyclomatic complexity ≤10. (7) Document ignore-directive bypass as intentional with code-review compensating control in DESIGN-008. New tests for symlink-to-directory containment, .claude/skills as a file, CWD-not-in-git fallback, glob target expansion, and exit-2 envelope shape (47 cases). scan.py 719 -> 455 lines; all 5 modules clean under taste-lints (0 errors)."

lessons: "action": "PR review feedback round 2: per-call enumerate_count cache to eliminate redundant filesystem walks per gemini perf comment; REQ-008 and DESIGN-008 related fields complete forward-trace (REQ -> DESIGN -> TASK); TASK-008 status changed from draft to in-progress and complexity: M added to satisfy spec validator; episode-2026-05-10-session-1830.json hand-rewritten with valid event-type enums (milestone/error/recovery), accurate metrics (9 commits, 32 files, 240 min, 2 errors, 2 recoveries), explicit decisions, and three lessons learned; test_scan.py uses importlib.util.spec_from_file_location with file-keyed module names to avoid sys.modules collision between .claude/skills and src/copilot-cli/skills mirrored test suites."
